title: Gluten-Free Dutch Fritter Bites
description: A gluten-free twist on traditional Dutch fritters, these bite-sized treats are perfect for snacking or as an appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together the fritters, springy, sesame, and sour.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritter bites until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the fritter bites from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
